overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player navigates from street level through plazas and up staircases, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a dense urban environment with holographic advertisements and towering buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians, moving away from the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall blue concrete building with large windows
wet asphalt street with moving vehicles and neon reflections
various illuminated signs and advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a neon-lit city street at night, with the camera walking forward along a concrete sidewalk. Pedestrians walk in the same direction while the wet street reflects the glow of distant neon signs. A blue building dominates the left side as the camera moves past the crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with building stairs and plaza entrance

events.description: turns left from main sidewalk into open plaza area with large digital screens

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing seated individuals on stairs, then turning toward the plaza

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on concrete stairs, one leaning against the wall

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading up to building entrance where NPCs are seated
opening leading to lower plaza with visible holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The camera continues past a building entrance where NPCs sit on stairs, then turns left into a more open plaza area. The street noise fades as the environment opens up to reveal large digital screens and orange architectural structures ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with holographic billboard and ascending stairs

events.description: begins ascending the main plaza staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and climbing the stairs, moving toward the overpass above

entered.detail: massive floating digital advertisement showing a woman's face above the plaza
wide concrete staircase with orange painted edges leading upward
bright orange safety railings along the stairs and platforms

segments.scene_description: Entering the open plaza, the camera approaches a massive holographic billboard floating above. The environment features orange-accented architecture and trash piles along the walls. The camera begins ascending the wide plaza stairs toward an overpass structure above.

events.description: white sports car drives past on the right side of the elevated road

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated roadway beneath concrete overpasses, moving through the urban canyon

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving past on the elevated road

entered.detail: concrete overpass ceiling and support columns creating an enclosed canyon effect
asphalt road on upper level with lane markings and barricades
illuminated vending machine with red and white branding against the wall

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the scene shifts to a narrow elevated roadway enclosed by overpass structures. The lighting becomes darker and more artificial. A white sports car passes by on the right as the camera continues through this urban canyon with graffiti-covered walls.

events.description: climbing the final staircase toward the brightly lit upper plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the final set of stairs leading to the upper plaza level with bright holographic displays visible above

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase with metal railings leading to upper level
bright opening at top of stairs revealing tall buildings and massive digital screens

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and climbs a final steep staircase, leaving the dark overpass area behind. Bright light from the upper plaza floods the top of the stairs, revealing towering skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements. The ascent continues toward this brightly lit upper city level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city street through a series of urban levels, culminating in a brightly lit upper plaza. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk past a blue building, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of neon signs and the movement of pedestrians. As the camera turns left away from the street, the environment opens into a plaza characterized by orange architectural structures and a massive floating holographic billboard. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends wide stairs and enters a dark, narrow elevated roadway enclosed by graffiti-covered walls, passing a white sports car in the artificial light. Finally, the camera climbs a steep final staircase, leaving the shadows of the overpass behind as it emerges into the brilliant light of the upper city, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and colossal holographic advertisements.
